prompt: Have you clearly defined your target customer?
failure_condition: There is not enough evidence that real customers will buy.
requirement_to_proceed: Obtain real customer evidence before proceeding.
retest_condition: Re-test after there is real evidence customers will buy.
constraint_label: You do not have a clearly defined target market
requirement_to_proceed_non_fail: Show credible customer demand.
retest_condition_non_fail: Re-run once demand evidence is stronger.
constraint_why: Assumption is not the same thing as demand.

prompt: Can you clearly explain how this business makes money?
failure_condition: The revenue model is not clear.
requirement_to_proceed: A clear explanation of how the business makes money is required before proceeding.
retest_condition: Re-run only after the revenue model can be explained simply.
constraint_label: You cannot clearly explain how this business generates revenue
requirement_to_proceed_non_fail: You must be able to clearly explain how this business generates revenue, incurs costs, and reaches break-even
retest_condition_non_fail: Re-run once revenue model, cost structure, and runway are clearly defined
constraint_why: If the money model is unclear, decisions will be poor.

prompt: Have you defined how you will deliver your first 10 customers?
failure_condition: Income is too dependent on too few customers or too narrow a source.
requirement_to_proceed: Spread revenue risk across more customers or sources.
retest_condition: Re-test after revenue is less exposed to one customer or source.
constraint_label: You do not have a clear plan for how you will deliver your first jobs
requirement_to_proceed_non_fail: Show broader and safer revenue sources.
retest_condition_non_fail: Re-run once revenue is more diversified.
constraint_why: Too much reliance on one source makes income fragile.

prompt: Have you identified your main cost drivers?
failure_condition: The money model is not clear enough to show how the business actually works.
requirement_to_proceed: Be able to explain clearly how revenue, costs and profit work.
retest_condition: Re-test after the revenue and cost structure can be explained simply.
constraint_label: You do not have a clear understanding of your operating costs
requirement_to_proceed_non_fail: You must be able to clearly explain how this business generates revenue, incurs costs, and reaches break-even
retest_condition_non_fail: Re-run once revenue model, cost structure, and runway are clearly defined
constraint_why: If the money model is unclear, decisions will be poor.
action_required:
Define your core cost structure:
- Labour cost per job
- Materials per job
- Overheads allocation
- Minimum viable margin

prompt: Can you commit consistent time to this for the next 30 days?

constraint_label: You do not have a clearly defined or realistic time commitment for this business
requirement_to_proceed_non_fail: You must define how you will consistently allocate time and energy to this business alongside current commitments
retest_condition_non_fail: Re-run once a clear and realistic time commitment plan is defined
constraint_why: Heavy personal debt can hide a weak business model.
